hero.title: Eva Montes
hero.lead: A delicate, intense and elegant artistic proposal with a contemporary identity.

biography.title: Precocious Talent
biography.description: Eva Montes began her musical training at the age of 6 with the violin, showing remarkable talent from a very early age. By the age of 11, she had already started composing her own pieces. Her interpretative ability stands out both on the violin and on the piano, establishing her as a young musician of great versatility. Throughout her artistic journey, she has been part of prestigious orchestral ensembles such as the Jove Orquestra de Ponent, the Julià Carbonell Orchestra, the Catalonia Youth Symphony Orchestra and the En Clave de Arts Orchestra, experiences that have contributed to her artistic and stage development. In the creative field, she has been recognized for three consecutive years with the composition award in the Liceu Young Creators Competition, consolidating her profile as an emerging author. In 2025, her talent as a singer-songwriter was also recognized nationally when she won the Mil Descobreix award in Xàtiva. In addition to her instrumental and compositional work, she has stage experience performing her own songs and exploring a wide range of styles including pop, rock, jazz and lyrical repertoire, reflecting her strong artistic sensitivity and remarkable adaptability.

items.title: Winner of Mil Descobreix 2025 Xàtiva, Valencia
items.description: Outstanding recognition in the field of young talent.

items.title: “Maestro Alonso” Piano Award July 2024 in El Escorial, Madrid
items.description: Winner of the first prize of the Maestro Alonso Legacy Association for the performance of “Pilarcita”.

items.title: Awarded at Joves Creadors Liceu three consecutive years: 2024, 2025 and 2026
items.description: Participation and recognition in the young creators program linked to the Liceu.

items.title: Third prize for vocal performance in the “Joves Interprets Musicals” competition in Andorra
items.description: Recognition obtained in the Andorran competition for young musical performers.

items.title: Honorable mention Sant Anastasi 2026 in singing
items.description: Honorary recognition in the singing category.

items.title: First place in the Academica International Studies Song Competition 2026
